name: Bittersweet Chocolate Chunk Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. For food processor method: Place butter (cut into small pieces), sugar, brown sugar, egg, and vanilla into a processor bowl. Process for about 10 seconds.
Or, in a mixer, cream softened butter with the same ingredients.
2. Stir flour with baking powder and salt; blend into the creamed mixture.
3. Add nuts and chopped chocolate bars (pieces). Stir into the dough.
4. Drop rounded teaspoons of dough onto ungreased baking sheets.
5. Bake at 375°F for 8-10 minutes, or until light golden brown. Cool on racks.
6. These cookies are delicious served warm when the chocolate is still soft.
7. To reheat cookies in the microwave, process 2 or more cookies for 15-20 seconds.
